app.title: TaskForceAI Sentinel Console
app.description: Multi-agent AI orchestration for comprehensive analysis
app.promptPlaceholder: Ask anything... Get deep, multi-perspective analysis from 4 AI agents working in parallel.
app.poweredBy: Powered by Vercel AI Gateway • Sentinel Intelligence
app.emptyState: No conversations yet. Start a new chat!

settings.title: Settings
settings.darkModeDescription: Use dark theme throughout the app
settings.memoryDescription: AI remembers useful context across chats.
settings.memorySummaryDescription: View and manage what TaskForceAI remembers about you.
settings.memoryEmptyDescription: Add details TaskForceAI should remember across chats.
settings.memorySaveErrorMessage: Unable to save this memory. Please try again.
settings.memoryDeleteErrorMessage: Unable to delete this memory. Please try again.
settings.webSearchDescription: Allow live web lookups for real-time information.
settings.codeExecutionDescription: Allow the AI to run code for advanced tasks.
settings.trustLayerDescription: Enable extra safety checks and execution reporting.
settings.automationDescription: Review active desktop sessions and approve sensitive automation actions from your phone.
settings.notificationsDescription: Receive notifications for sync results and alerts
settings.clearCacheMessage: This will remove local chats, queued prompts, and cached account data from this device. Are you sure?
settings.noHandler: Unable to clear cache right now.
settings.cacheErrorMessage: Unable to clear local data. Please try again.
settings.notificationsHint: Enable push notifications to get real-time updates when TaskForceAI automations need you.
settings.notificationsPermissionDeniedMessage: Allow TaskForceAI notifications in your device settings to stay in the loop.
settings.notificationsErrorMessage: We couldn't update your notification preference. Please try again.
settings.notificationsSystemDisabledMessage: Enable TaskForceAI notifications from system settings to receive alerts.
settings.syncErrorMessage: Unable to complete sync. Please try again.

offline.offlineMessage: Offline - Changes will sync when connected

rateLimit.title: Rate Limit Reached
rateLimit.hint: Upgrade to Pro for higher rate limits and faster response times

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteWarning: Deleting your account permanently removes all data. This action cannot be undone.
profile.logoutMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?
profile.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete the account "{{username}}" and all personal data.
profile.deleteSuccessMessage: Your account and personal data have been permanently removed.
profile.deleteErrorMessage: We couldn't delete your account. Please try again.
profile.exportCompleteMessage: Your data export was saved to {{path}}.
profile.exportErrorMessage: Unable to export your data right now. Please try again later.
